functions.title: Guide Book #102
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #102§r
§lBook Keeper§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Summoner, Spellcaster, Magical, Villager, Trader, Humanoid.
•§lSpawns in§r: Villager Libraries
•§lHealth§r: 30

•§lWalk speed§r: 0.3
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Learning Books
•§lPossible drops§r: Book, Guide Book, Learning Book of Book Keeping, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Monsters, Sculk blocks.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Illager,

Vex, Zombie.
•§lRange attack§r: Virtuous Magic Missile
•§lProjectile damage§r: 5
•Can summon 2 §lVirtuous Flying Book§r every minute around itself to attack its target.
•Can sleep in a bed at night and responds to bells.

•Can trade with players.
•Can resupply trades by interacting with a nearby §lChiseled Bookshelf§r.
•Can transform into another villager type when given a §lLearning Book§r.
